host_keyboard.firmware_note: US HID scancodes from ZMK; Windows NO renders øæå at SemiColon/Quote/LeftBrace on L0. Layer 1 bracket keys use same scancodes — switch to US English (Win+Space or F16) for programming punctuation.

layers.dynamic_policy: L1-L6 and L8-L10 are assigned by each generated layout. Do not infer mouse, scroll, travel, app, system, code, Excel, DMS, or navigation roles from layer numbers.

host_triggers.F13: Spare macro/app trigger (æ now direct on base 12,2 via Norwegian layout)
host_triggers.F14: Spare macro/app trigger (ø now direct on base 11,2 via Norwegian layout)
host_triggers.F15: Spare macro/app trigger (å now direct on base 12,1 via Norwegian layout)

design_defaults.scroll: trackball scroll-mode capability is tied to the firmware target layer; generated layouts decide how it is accessed
design_defaults.mac_mode: generated shortcut/access overlay, not a fixed layer number
